hypothesis: If automated chemical information extraction on ChemX nanozyme and chelate-complex articles uses a single-agent pipeline with structure-preserving PDF-to-markdown conversion and integrated image captioning, then it will achieve higher per-column F1 scores and better JSON schema compliance than GPT-5/GPT-5 Thinking, a general-purpose ChatGPT Agent, and domain-specific multi-agent systems because preserving document structure and reducing orchestration complexity improves end-to-end extraction accuracy and robustness.
